summary: Fixed three bugs: added author_paren_year pattern (Smith (2020) now detected), made theorem_attr_ref case-insensitive (By Lemma 2.1 now detected), and added LITERATURE_DIR two-tier fallback to skill-cite. All integration tests pass, real artifact scan returns 26 citations.
